title: Warp Around
description: it says what it says it does, it allows you to tpa and warp.
body:
# explaination

It is a very very simple mod

You can TPA..

And you can WARP!!

you can name warps, delete, list them, whatever you want

## USAGES

- /warp list = list all warps made
- /warp new [NAME] = creates a new warp
- /warp delete [NAME] = deletes a warp
- /warp info [NAME] = Tells you about a warp

- /tpa [PLAYER] = tpa to a player
- /tpa accept = accepts
- /tpa deny = rejects

- /home = go home
- /home new = new home
- /home delete = delete home
